matched.name: Academia
matched.description: Academia is a classroom designed for schools and colleges. The layout supports organized day-to-day storage and easier access to essentials.

overview_sections.heading: Smart Storage & Stability for Learning
overview_sections.body: Academia is a thoughtfully designed classroom desk that prioritizes functionality and long-lasting durability. Its high-quality MDF tabletop provides a sturdy, reliable surface suited for everyday academic use.
With integrated, practical storage solutions, Academia blends style with utility effortlessly. Its clean, modern design makes it an ideal choice for contemporary learning environments.
Ergonomically contoured back handle allows easy lifting and repositioning of the chair, enabling quick, effortless classroom rearrangements without strain.
Integrated wire-mesh under-desk storage offers ample space for books and bags while keeping the desktop clear and the classroom neatly organized.

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.

matched.name: Audi Chair
matched.description: Audi Chair is a auditorium designed for posture support and comfort. The chair includes dedicated head and neck support for longer work sessions.

overview_sections.heading: Comfort Meets Modern Design
overview_sections.body: Designed to elevate auditorium seating, the Audi Chair combines ergonomic comfort with a sleek, modern aesthetic. Its thoughtfully contoured form ensures lasting support for extended seating.
With a sturdy build engineered for durability, the Audi Chair is ideal for auditoriums and event spaces, seamlessly blending style, functionality, and long-term performance.
Ergonomically designed armrest with an integrated cup holder adds comfort and convenience, enhancing the overall auditorium seating experience.
Plush cushioning with a supportive headrest ensures superior comfort and ergonomic support, even during extended auditorium sessions.

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.

matched.name: Classcraft
matched.description: Classcraft is a classroom designed for schools and institutes.

overview_sections.heading: Durable & Organized for the Classroom
overview_sections.body: ClassCraft is an ideal classroom desk crafted to support focused learning through a durable tabletop and thoughtfully designed ergonomic features that enhance everyday comfort.

Paired with a sturdy PE seat, ClassCraft provides reliable stability and long-lasting performance. Its functional design makes it perfectly suited for modern classrooms that value durability and efficiency.
The ergonomically designed back handle allows effortless lifting and smooth movement of the chair, enabling quick classroom reconfiguration with minimal effort.
Integrated under-desk wire basket combined with a built-in tabletop stationery holder keeps essentials organized, accessible, and the work surface clutter-free for better focus.

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.

matched.name: Connecta
matched.description: Connecta is a library designed for teamwork and shared spaces.

features: Efficient Design for Every Library Space

overview_sections.heading: Efficient Design for Every Library Space
overview_sections.body: The Connecta library table blends modern aesthetics with practical functionality, creating a refined yet purposeful presence in library environments. Its clean design complements contemporary interiors effortlessly.
With a spacious surface that supports study, collaboration, and organization, Connecta is a perfect choice for libraries seeking both style and everyday efficiency.
These tables can be easily connected for group activities or separated for individual use, offering flexible layouts that adapt to changing learning and collaboration needs.\

Engineered with uniquely angled, reinforced legs, the table delivers exceptional stability and load-bearing strength, ensuring wobble-free performance even in high-use classroom and collaborative environments.

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.

matched.name: Performer
matched.description: Performer is a classroom designed for comfort, durability, and daily productivity. The layout supports organized day-to-day storage and easier access to essentials.

features: Designed for Focused Learning and Lasting Comfort

overview_sections.heading: Designed for Focused Learning and Lasting Comfort
overview_sections.body: Designed especially for classroom environments, the Performer chair blends elegance with ergonomic support. Its well-considered form encourages proper posture, allowing students to sit comfortably and stay attentive during long learning hours.

Built with durability at its core, the Performer chair offers reliable, long-lasting support for daily use. Its efficient design adapts seamlessly to diverse educational settings, making it a dependable choice for modern classrooms.
Compact, integrated storage keeps books and essentials neatly within arm’s reach, reducing desktop clutter and maximizing focus.
Built-in bag hook keeps school bags off the floor and within easy reach, maintaining a clutter-free, hygienic workspace while improving classroom organization and safety.

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.
